mapper.update:
/* wireCnslMapper.updateWireCounselCustInfo */
UPDATE NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL@DL_MCP SET COUNSEL_NM = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_NM), '*') , COUNSEL_CTN = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_CTN), '*') WHERE ( COUNSEL_STATUS IN ('C', 'D') OR (COUNSEL_STATUS = 'S' AND DONE_DT < SYSDATE)) AND INSTR(COUNSEL_CTN, '*') = 0
